holdings.infoBox: NUMV is an equity ETF with a total of 94 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company stock at 2.93%, United Rentals at 2.59%, Cardinal Health at 2.32%, Baker Hughes Company at 2.23%, and Steel Dynamics at 2.14%.

overview.description: The Nuveen ESG Mid-Cap Value ETF (NUMV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Mid Cap Value index. The fund tracks an index of US mid-cap value stocks that score highly on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) criteria. The fund weighting uses a multi-factor optimizer. NUMV was launched on Dec 13, 2016 and is issued by Nuveen.
infoTable: MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Mid Cap Value
